x-enumeration-literals.name: Account Holder (Customer / Participant)
x-enumeration-literals.description: The individual or entity who opens and maintains the incentive account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Financial Institution (Bank / Service Provider)
x-enumeration-literals.description: The bank or financial institution offering the incentive account and managing the associated program.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Program Administrator
x-enumeration-literals.description: A team or department within the bank responsible for managing and overseeing the incentive program, ensuring compliance, tracking performance, and handling disputes.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Third-Party Service Provider
x-enumeration-literals.description: External partners involved in the delivery or management of the incentive (e.g., payment processors, reward point vendors, mobile app partners).
